summary: On 05/04/2025 at 0646 hours a Trooper contacted Luketravis Zwaschka-Taylor at the Circle K on Phillips Field Road. He gave false informations regarding his identity. The Trooper arrested him for his outstanding warrant and remanded him on an additional charge of false report.

title: AST Theft: North Pole [AK25042400]
summary: On 05/03/2025 at 2331 hours Troopers took the call of a theft in Moose Creek. An individual did not pay for their cab. A suspect has been identified, and this case is under investigation.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: AST Title 47: Fairbanks [AK25042416]
summary: On 05/04/2025 at 0154 hours Troopers responded to the call of a male jumping in front of cars on Airport Way. The male was located and detained. He was transported to FMH for Title 47 due to his statements and actions regarding being suicidal.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch
